subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath attained unto the Most Great Horizon, and that which was mentioned therein hath been observed. Grieve not over this world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابت بمنظر اکبر فائز و آنچه در او مذکور مشاهده شد لاتحزن من الدنیا و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @suffering and imprisonment, @consolation and comfort
